response.justification: Strong hands-on software engineer with 20 years of experience and recent AI infrastructure work, but lacks the strategic advisory background and AI expertise depth required for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy role. Career has been focused on hands-on engineering and building platforms rather than strategic technology advising. Recent move to AI-agent infrastructure (April 2025) is promising but too early-stage to demonstrate the recognized AI expertise and strategic influence expected.
strengths: 20+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains with demonstrated ability to lead technical teams
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing alignment with cutting-edge AI technology trends
Entrepreneurial background as GISCollective founder combined with staff-level roles at multiple organizations demonstrates leadership at scale
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025) with limited evidence of recognized products or platforms built with AI before this role
Career trajectory focused on hands-on engineering and platform building rather than strategic advisory, customer advising, or thought leadership positions
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; primarily computer science background without specialized AI/ML credentials

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq
Lack of advanced AI degree or specialized credentials
